arts.ttl: How to watch Brighton vs Tottenham: TV channel and live stream for Premier League today
arts.sum: Brennan Johnson is looking to score for the sixth game on the spin

arts.ttl: Hurzeler: I will always back Adam Webster
arts.sum: “First of all, all the people who criticise him or text him critical things on social media, I think we should invite them here and they should have an experience day with Adam Webster – how professional this guy is, how helpful this guy is, how supportive, what a great leader he is. “He made an easy mistake, he knows it, but I think we shouldn't judge the player and the person after making one easy mistake because I see the whole context.

arts.ttl: Record-breaking transfer and England call up - the rise of new Spurs striker Domiic Solanke
arts.sum: Few Premier League players are enjoying as impressive a start to the new season as much as Tottenham striker Dominic Solanke. The 27-year-old striker became the London club’s record...

arts.ttl: Tottenham's Timo Werner labelled 'ridiculous' as Ange Postecoglou sent Brighton warning
arts.sum: Former Tottenham midfielder Jamie O'Hara fears Spurs are facing a big challenge to retain their impressive recent form against Brighton when the two sides meet at the Amex in the Premier League on Sunday

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: £13m Olympic gold medallist 'scouted' in Europa League
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly had scouts in attendance to watch Porto's Samu Omorodion torment Manchester United in the Europa League on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: THE SHARPE END: Spurs' new attacking guard has a bright future under Ange Postecoglou after years of heavily relying on Son Heung-min and Harry Kane
arts.sum: JAME SHARPE: Ange Postecoglou managed without the departed Kane last season and this term we're seeing a further shift. Son remains a top player but he's 32 and has a hamstring injury.

Sunday's trip to Brighton & Hove Albion will be Tottenham's final match before the upcoming international period and they will want to sign off with victory on the south coast. Spurs have put a difficult period at the start of the campaign behind them in style, showing the heights they can reach during last weekend's 3-0 demolition of ten-man Manchester United at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: THE SHARPE END: Spurs' new attacking guard has a bright future under Ange Postecoglou after years of relying on Son Heung-min and Harry Kane
arts.sum: JAME SHARPE: Ange Postecoglou managed without the departed Kane last season and this term we're seeing a further shift. Son remains a top player but he's 32 and has a hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Craig Bellamy backs Brennan Johnson’s decision to quit social media
arts.sum: The forward has scored in five consecutive Tottenham games since deactivating his Instagram account.

arts.ttl: Tottenham goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario vows to ignore critics and be a leader
arts.sum: Guglielmo Vicario faced scrutiny after Arsenal scored from a set-piece last month, but has produced a string of fine displays since.
